title: Normalized landing zone and memory handoff
goal: Write normalized envelopes/manifests under runtime data and hand them off to existing memory ingestion.
acceptance: Landing zone writes manifest and normalized object envelopes atomically.
Raw API responses are not retained unless explicit quarantine mode is enabled.
Secret-like values are blocked or converted to handles before memory indexing.
Successful handoff creates memory snapshots/chunks with external provenance and citations.
Deletes/tombstones deactivate active memory snapshots when policy requires it.
